name: Mystic Dungeons Expansion
description: Adds new dungeon locations, powerful enemies, and rare loot

crystal_cave.name: Crystal Cave
crystal_cave.description: A cavern filled with glowing crystals that illuminate the walls with ethereal light. The crystals hum with magical energy.

dragon_lair.name: Ancient Dragon Lair
dragon_lair.description: The lair of an ancient dragon, filled with treasure and danger. Bones litter the floor and the air smells of sulfur.

underground_city.name: Underground City
underground_city.description: A vast subterranean city carved from living rock. Strange glowing fungi provide illumination.

dwarf_king.name: King Stonebeard
dwarf_king.dialogue: Welcome to my underground kingdom, surface dweller. What brings you to these depths?

deep_gnome.name: Tinker Gemspark
deep_gnome.dialogue: Ah, a visitor! Care to see my latest invention?

slay_crystal_golem.title: Crystal Guardian
slay_crystal_golem.description: Defeat the Crystal Golem guarding the ancient crystal chamber.

dragon_hunter.title: Dragon Hunter
dragon_hunter.description: Slay the young dragon terrorizing the mountain region.
